ANTHROPIC_AUTH_TOKEN.description: Anthropic API key (or proxy auth token). Empty triggers fail-loud.

ANTHROPIC_BASE_URL.description: Optional proxy base URL; defaults to official endpoint.

ANTHROPIC_DEFAULT_SONNET_MODEL.description: All 4 agents (CEO/CFO/CRO/Analyst) use this Sonnet tier.

PYTHONUNBUFFERED.description: Force unbuffered stdout for live logs.
